defaults._comment: Default values applied to all sources unless overridden per source.
_requirements_mode_options: structured — id, url, text, priority per requirement item (default, compact)
full       — structured + page-level intro/context paragraph(s) per category
_blueprints_mode_options: full    — title, summary, topics + all sections with content (default)
summary — title, summary, topics only (no sections, minimal size)
